overall.description: First-person exploration of a rainy neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza at night. The player walks through a futuristic urban environment, discovers a dead body, looks up at towering skyscrapers, and continues down the street past digital billboards and other pedestrians. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

pedestrian in purple jacket walking toward camera

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic urban plaza. The camera moves forward past pedestrians, with a palm tree on the right and neon-lit office towers ahead. Digital billboards and ground lanterns illuminate the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with benches and digital advertisement kiosks

events.description: dead body discovered lying face down in a pool of blood on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a dead body on the ground, slowing to examine the scene

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking past the body without stopping

entered.detail: corpse lying face down in a pool of blood on the wet ground
tall digital display showing product advertisements with red and white graphics
metal bench on the plaza near the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward through the plaza and discovers a dead body lying on the wet pavement. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks past the body. The scene is lit by nearby digital advertisement kiosks and neon strip lights along the building edges.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above
camera pans around to view the surrounding architecture and skybridges

agents.ego_description: looking up at the skyscrapers and surrounding architecture, taking in the vertical cityscape

entered.detail: tall building with multiple glass balconies and illuminated windows rising into the sky
elevated walkway connecting buildings with cyan neon lighting underneath
stacked balconies with glass railings on the right side building

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to gaze at the towering skyscrapers rising into the rainy night sky. Skybridges with neon lighting connect the buildings, and the perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the cyberpunk city architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage and water features

events.description: camera returns to street level and resumes walking forward along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing other pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near building entrance looking at the street

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for 'WILD BLUE' establishment with teal lettering
tall vertical light pole with bright white illumination
rectangular pool of water reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level and continues down a pedestrian walkway lined with neon signs including a prominent 'WILD BLUE' establishment. The street features reflective water features, tall illuminated poles, and moderate pedestrian traffic walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk plaza that shifts from a wide urban exploration to a grim discovery and a gaze at the city's vertical scale. It begins by moving forward past pedestrians and a palm tree, where neon-lit office towers and digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet pavement. As the camera advances through the plaza, the view descends to reveal a dead body lying on the ground while a pedestrian with an umbrella walks past under the glow of advertisement kiosks. The perspective then tilts sharply upward to capture the towering skyscrapers and neon-lit skybridges stretching into the rainy night sky before returning to street level. Finally, the camera continues down a pedestrian walkway lined with illuminated poles and reflective water features, passing a prominent Wild Blue establishment amidst the flow of oncoming traffic.
